creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 226504
Screenshot: KDE Crash Handler dialogue, 08:15 this morning

### Background (continued)

Foreground: KDE Crash Handler dialogue. 

Mid ground: System Settings, no progress beyond the 18% completion that was measured around ten minutes earlier. 

Rear ground: htop, two baloo_file processes, the lower numbered of which (4647) was seen in the screenshot at comment 2. The crashing baloo_file_extractor is under the higher numbered baloo_file process (5071). 

----
